name: DisplayPipelineAttributes
summary: Represents display pipeline settings, such as "show transparency" and "show grips".

constructors.name: DisplayPipelineAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DisplayPipelineAttributes class

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the DisplayPipelineAttributes

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the DisplayPipelineAttributes and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.Finalize().)

methods.name: GetColorFadeEffect
methods.signature: public void GetColorFadeEffect(out Color fadeColor, out float fadeAmount)
methods.summary: Get the current color fade effect data.

methods.name: GetDiagonalHatchEffect
methods.signature: public void GetDiagonalHatchEffect(out float hatchStrength, out float hatchWidth)
methods.summary: Get the current diagonal hatch strength and width in pixels.

params.name: hatchStrength
params.doc: The strength of the hatch effect.

params.name: hatchWidth
params.doc: The width of the diagonal hatch in pixels.

methods.name: GetDitherTransparencyEffect
methods.summary: Get the current dither transparency amount.

methods.name: GetFill
methods.signature: public void GetFill(out Color topLeft, out Color bottomLeft, out Color topRight, out Color bottomRight)
methods.summary: Get fill colors used for clearing the frame buffer

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)

methods.name: GetSurfaceEdgeThicknessUsage
methods.summary: Helper function for setting the SurfaceEdgeThicknessFlags

methods.name: GetSurfaceIsoApplyPattern
methods.signature: public void GetSurfaceIsoApplyPattern(out bool u, out bool v, out bool w)

params.name: u
params.doc: Gets mode in the u direction

params.name: v
params.doc: Gets mode in the v direction

params.name: w
params.doc: Gets mode in the w direction

methods.name: GetSurfaceIsoColorUsage
methods.summary: Helper function for getting SurfaceIsoColorsUsed and SurfaceSingleIsoColor

methods.name: GetSurfaceIsoThicknessUsage
methods.summary: This is a helper function that combines getting IsoThicknessUsed and SurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsageFlags settings to correspond to the behavor of the Settings page.

methods.name: GetSurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsage
methods.summary: This is a helper function that combines getting SurfaceNakeEdgeUseNormalThickness and SurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsageFlags settings to correspond to the behavor of the Settings page.

methods.name: HasColorFadeEffect
methods.summary: Returns TRUE if there is a color fade effect enabled with a color fade effect amount larger than 0.0, FALSE otherwise.

methods.name: HasDiagonalHatchEffect
methods.summary: Returns TRUE if there is a diagonal hatch effect enabled with a hatch strength larger than 0.0, FALSE otherwise.

methods.name: HasDitherTransparencyEffect
methods.summary: Returns TRUE if there is a dither transparency effect enabled with a transparency amount larger than 0.0, FALSE otherwise.

methods.name: SetColorFadeEffect
methods.signature: public void SetColorFadeEffect(in Color fadeColor, in float fadeAmount)
methods.summary: Set a color fade effect to make objects fade a given amount towards a given color.

params.name: fadeColor
params.doc: The amount of fade towards the given color (0..1).

methods.name: SetDiagonalHatchEffect
methods.signature: public void SetDiagonalHatchEffect(in float hatchStrength, in float hatchWidth)
methods.summary: Set a diagonal hatch effect to make objects render with diagonal hatch with a given strength and width in pixels. The effect works by brightening and darkening pixels in a diagonal pattern.

params.name: hatchStrength
params.doc: The strength of the hatch effect (0..1).

params.name: hatchWidth
params.doc: The width of the diagonal hatch in pixels (>= 0).

methods.name: SetDitherTransparencyEffect
methods.summary: Set a dither transparency effect to make objects render with a given amount of transparency using a dither effect.

methods.name: SetFill(Color)
methods.summary: Set fill mode to solid color and set the fill color

methods.name: SetFill(Color, Color)
methods.signature: public void SetFill(Color gradientTop, Color gradientBottom)
methods.summary: Set fill mode to two color and set the colors

methods.name: SetFill(Color, Color, Color, Color)
methods.signature: public void SetFill(Color gradientTopLeft, Color gradientBottomLeft, Color gradientTopRight, Color gradientBottomRight)
methods.summary: Set the fill mode to four color gradient and set the colors

methods.name: SetSurfaceEdgeThicknessUsage
methods.summary: Helper function for getting the SurfaceEdgeThicknessFlags

methods.name: SetSurfaceIsoApplyPattern
methods.signature: public void SetSurfaceIsoApplyPattern(bool u, bool v, bool w)

methods.name: SetSurfaceIsoColorUsage
methods.summary: Helper function for setting SurfaceIsoColorsUsed and SurfaceIsoSingleColor

methods.name: SetSurfaceIsoThicknessUsage
methods.summary: This is a helper function that combines setting IsoThicknessUsed and SurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsageFlags settings to correspond to the behavor of the Settings page.

methods.name: SetSurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsage
methods.summary: This is a helper function that combines setting SurfaceNakeEdgeUseNormalThickness and SurfaceNakedEdgeThicknessUsageFlags settings to correspond to the behavor of the Settings page.

properties.name: AxesSizePercentage
properties.summary: Size of axes as a percentage of the grid extents.

properties.name: BackfaceDisplayStyle
properties.summary: Changes the display of the backfaces (the side opposite of the surface normal direction).

properties.name: BackMaterialShine
properties.summary: Get or set the back material shine (0 to Rhino.DocObjects.MaxShine). You must call DisplayModeDescription.UpdateDisplayMode() to commit this change.

properties.name: BackMaterialTransparency
properties.summary: Get or set the back material transparency (0 to 100). You must call DisplayModeDescription.UpdateDisplayMode() to commit this change.

properties.name: BackOverrideObjectReflectivity
properties.summary: Objects acquire reflectivity from render materials.

properties.name: BackOverrideObjectTransparency
properties.summary: Objects acquire transparency from render materials.

properties.name: BakeTextures
properties.summary: Adds the ability to display procedural textures in viewports. When it is turned off, procedural textures in viewports look different from the rendering.

properties.name: CastShadows
properties.summary: Cast shadows.

properties.name: ClippingEdgeColor
properties.summary: Clipping edge color

properties.name: ClippingEdgeColorUsage
properties.summary: Specifies how the color for the Edges is determined

properties.name: ClippingEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Edge thickness in pixels.

properties.name: ClippingFillColor
properties.summary: Clipping plane fill color

properties.name: ClippingPlaneFillColorUsage
properties.summary: Specifies how the color for the clipping plane object fill is determined.

properties.name: ClippingShadeColor
properties.summary: Clipping plane solid color

properties.name: ClippingShadeColorUsage
properties.summary: Specifies how to shade the clipping plane

properties.name: ClippingShadeSelectedPlane
properties.summary: Shades the selected clipping plane.

properties.name: ClippingShadeTransparency
properties.summary: Specifies the clipping plane transparency percentage.

properties.name: ClipSelectionHighlight
properties.summary: Clips the highlight wires. Shaded selections always clip.

properties.name: ControlPolygonColor
properties.summary: Control polygon color

properties.name: ControlPolygonGripSize
properties.summary: The control point size in pixels.

properties.name: ControlPolygonHighlight
properties.summary: Highlights the segments of the control polygon on either side of the control points.

properties.name: ControlPolygonShow
properties.summary: Shows the control polygon and only shows the control points.

properties.name: ControlPolygonShowPoints
properties.summary: Shows the control points while the control polygon is displayed.

properties.name: ControlPolygonShowSurface
properties.summary: Shows the object while the control polygon is displayed.

properties.name: ControlPolygonStyle
properties.summary: PointStyle for the control polygon. Supported values are ControlPoint, RoundControlPoint, VariableDot, and RoundDot

properties.name: ControlPolygonUseFixedSingleColor
properties.summary: Specifies a color for the control polygon.

properties.name: ControlPolygonUseSolidLines
properties.summary: Use dotted / solid lines

properties.name: ControlPolygonWireThickness
properties.summary: The width of the control polygon lines in pixels.

properties.name: CurveColor
properties.summary: Color used for drawing curves

properties.name: CurveThickness
properties.summary: Pixel thickness for curves

properties.name: CurveThicknessScale
properties.summary: Scale thickness for curves

properties.name: CurveThicknessUsage
properties.summary: Use a pixel thickness (CurveThickness) or a scale thickness (CurveThicknessScale)

properties.name: CustomGroundPlaneAltitude
properties.summary: Height above the world XY plane in model units

properties.name: CustomGroundPlaneAutomaticAltitude
properties.summary: Turns on auto-elevation that moves Ground Plane to the lowest point of the objects in the model.

properties.name: CustomGroundPlaneOn
properties.summary: Turn the custom ground plane on or off

properties.name: CustomGroundPlaneShadowOnly
properties.summary: Makes the ground plane transparent, but allows shadows to still be cast on it.

properties.name: DynamicDisplayUsage
properties.summary: Sets the appearance of objects in the display

properties.name: FillMode
properties.summary: Get or set the frame buffer fill mode.

properties.name: FrontDiffuse
properties.summary: Shades the current viewport with no smoothing so the individual render mesh faces are visible.

properties.name: FrontFlatShaded
properties.summary: Shades the current viewport with no smoothing so the individual render mesh faces are visible.

properties.name: FrontMaterialShine
properties.summary: Get or set the front material shine (0 to Rhino.DocObjects.MaxShine). You must call DisplayModeDescription.UpdateDisplayMode() to commit this change.

properties.name: FrontMaterialTransparency
properties.summary: Get or set the front material transparency (0 to 100). You must call DisplayModeDescription.UpdateDisplayMode() to commit this change.

properties.name: FrontOverrideObjectReflectivity
properties.summary: Objects acquire reflectivity from render materials.

properties.name: FrontOverrideObjectTransparency
properties.summary: Objects acquire transparency from render materials.

properties.name: GhostLockedObjects
properties.summary: Set locked appearance

properties.name: GridPlaneColor
properties.summary: The color of the grid plane

properties.name: GridPlaneTransparency
properties.summary: Transparency of the grid plane, percentage (0-100)

properties.name: GridPlaneVisibility
properties.summary: Set when to show the grid plane

properties.name: GridTransparency
properties.summary: Transparency of the grid, percentage (0-100)

properties.name: GroundPlaneUsage
properties.summary: Turn on or off custom Ground plane settungs

properties.name: HighlightSurfaces
properties.summary: Shades entire object with highlight color.

properties.name: LayersFollowLockUsage
properties.summary: Applies the settings for locked objects to locked layers.

properties.name: LinearWorkflowUsage
properties.summary: Turn on or off custom linear workflow settings

properties.name: LockedColor
properties.summary: Locked Object Color

properties.name: LockedObjectsDrawBehindOthers
properties.summary: Locked object are drawn behind other objects

properties.name: LockedObjectTransparency
properties.summary: LockedObjectTransparency.

properties.name: LockedObjectUsage
properties.summary: Set asource of display attributes for locked objects

properties.name: MeshEdgeColor
properties.summary: Sets the mesh edge color

properties.name: MeshEdgeColorReduction
properties.summary: The darken percentage of the color

properties.name: MeshEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Mesh edge width in pixels

properties.name: MeshNakedEdgeColor
properties.summary: Sets the naked edge color

properties.name: MeshNakedEdgeColorReduction
properties.summary: The darken percentage of the color

properties.name: MeshNakedEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Naked mesh edge width in pixels.}

properties.name: MeshNonmanifoldEdgeColor
properties.summary: Sets the nonmanifold edge color

properties.name: MeshNonmanifoldEdgeColorReduction
properties.summary: The darken percentage of the color

properties.name: MeshNonmanifoldEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Non-manifold mesh edge width in pixels

properties.name: MeshVertexSize
properties.summary: Mesh vertex size in pixels

properties.name: PlaneUsesGridColor
properties.summary: If true, use the grid thin line color in App settings

properties.name: PostProcessFrameBuffer
properties.summary: Linear workflow Adjust output image

properties.name: PostProcessGamma
properties.summary: Linear workflow Output image gamma

properties.name: PreProcessColors
properties.summary: Linear workflow input colors

properties.name: PreProcessGamma
properties.summary: Linear workflow input gamma

properties.name: PreProcessTextures
properties.summary: Linear workflow input textures

properties.name: RealtimeDisplayId
properties.summary: Get the ID of the real-time display engine attached to the view. This will be Guid.Empty if no real-time display engine is in use. This can be the case for instance when starting a _Render session for a real-time viewport integration. That still would cause this ID to be Guid.Empty.

properties.name: RealtimeRenderPasses
properties.summary: Get or set the real-time passes amount

properties.name: ShadeVertexColors
properties.summary: Shade using vertex colors.

properties.name: ShadingEnabled
properties.summary: Draw shaded meshes and surfaces

properties.name: ShadowBiasX
properties.summary: ShadowBiasX (Self shadowing artifacts) from 0 (dirty) to 50 (cleaner).

properties.name: ShadowClippingRadius
properties.summary: Camera-based shadow clipping radius

properties.name: ShadowEdgeBlur
properties.summary: Set blurring from 0 (no blurring) to 16 (maximum blurring)

properties.name: ShadowIntensity
properties.summary: Shadow intensity (percentage 0-100)

properties.name: ShadowMemoryUsage
properties.summary: Value from 1 to 16384 indicating how much memory is to be allocated. Actual memory use is ShadowMemoryUsage*ShadowMemoryUsage*4.

properties.name: ShadowsIgnoreUserDefinedClippingPlanes
properties.summary: If true, shadows ignore user-defined clipping planes

properties.name: ShadowSoftEdgeQuality
properties.summary: Soft edge quality, from 0 (none/faster) to 12 (softer/slower)

properties.name: ShadowsOn
properties.summary: Enable shadows

properties.name: ShadowTransparencyTolerance
properties.summary: Transparency tolerance from 0 (never cast shadows) to 100 (always case shadows)

properties.name: ShowAnnotations
properties.summary: Show annotations.

properties.name: ShowClipIntersectionEdges
properties.summary: Show edges and hatches where clipping planes clip objects

properties.name: ShowClipIntersectionSurfaces
properties.summary: Show fills where clipping planes clip solid objects

properties.name: ShowClippingEdges
properties.summary: Shows the edges between the clipping plane and clipped objects.

properties.name: ShowClippingFills
properties.summary: When a clipping plane intersects a 3-D object and the section is closed, the section is filled.

properties.name: ShowClippingPlanes
properties.summary: Show clipping planes.

properties.name: ShowCurves
properties.summary: Draw curves

properties.name: ShowIsoCurves
properties.summary: Draw surface ISO curves.

properties.name: ShowLights
properties.summary: Show light widgets.

properties.name: ShowMeshEdges
properties.summary: Display mesh edges on/off

properties.name: ShowMeshNakedEdges
properties.summary: Display mesh naked edges on/off

properties.name: ShowMeshNonmanifoldEdges
properties.summary: Display mesh manifold edges on/off

properties.name: ShowPointClouds
properties.summary: Show point clouds.

properties.name: ShowPoints
properties.summary: Show points.

properties.name: ShowRealtimeRenderProgressBar
properties.summary: Get or set whether the display is used for preview rendering or not.

properties.name: ShowSubDBoundary
properties.summary: Set visibility of SubD naked edges.

properties.name: ShowSubDCreases
properties.summary: Set visibility of SubD creased edges.

properties.name: ShowSubDEdges
properties.summary: Set visibility of SubD smooth edges.

properties.name: ShowSubDNonmanifoldEdges
properties.summary: Turn on/off color differentiation of SubD symmetry children.

properties.name: ShowSurfaceEdge
properties.summary: Turn Surface Edge visibility on or off

properties.name: ShowSurfaceEdges
properties.summary: Show surface edges.

properties.name: ShowSurfaceNakedEdge
properties.summary: Turn Surface Naked Edge visibility on or off

properties.name: ShowTangentEdges
properties.summary: Show tangent edges.

properties.name: ShowTangentSeams
properties.summary: Show tangent seams.

properties.name: ShowText
properties.summary: Show text.

properties.name: SkylightShadowQuality
properties.summary: Skylight shadow quality, from 0 (lowest) to 8 (highest)

properties.name: StereoContext
properties.summary: Get or set the stereo render context.

properties.name: SubDBoundaryApplyPattern
properties.summary: Apply pattern to the edge

properties.name: SubDBoundaryColorReduction
properties.summary: Color reduction percentage

properties.name: SubDBoundaryEdgeColor
properties.summary: Edge color

properties.name: SubDBoundaryEdgeColorUsage
properties.summary: Edge color usage

properties.name: SubDBoundaryEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Edge thickness (pixels).

properties.name: SubDBoundaryThicknessScale
properties.summary: Edge thickness scale

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorApplyPattern
properties.summary: Apply pattern to the edge

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorColorReduction
properties.summary: Color reduction percentage

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorEdgeColor
properties.summary: Edge color

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorEdgeColorUsage
properties.summary: Edge color usage

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Edge thickness (pixels).

properties.name: SubDCreaseInteriorThicknessScale
properties.summary: Edge thickness scale

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldApplyPattern
properties.summary: Apply pattern to the edge

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldColorReduction
properties.summary: Color reduction percentage

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldEdgeColor
properties.summary: Edge color

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldEdgeColorUsage
properties.summary: Edge color usage

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Edge thickness (pixels).

properties.name: SubDNonManifoldThicknessScale
properties.summary: Edge thickness scale

properties.name: SubDReflectionAxisLineColor
properties.summary: Reflection axis line color

properties.name: SubDReflectionPlaneAxisLineOn
properties.summary: Apply Turnh on or off the reflection plane axis line

properties.name: SubDReflectionPlaneColor
properties.summary: Reflection plane color

properties.name: SubDReflectionPlaneColorReduction
properties.summary: SubD replection plane color reduction percentage

properties.name: SubDReflectionPlaneColorUsage
properties.summary: SubD replection plane color use

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorApplyPattern
properties.summary: Apply pattern to the edge

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorColorReduction
properties.summary: Color reduction percentage

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorEdgeColor
properties.summary: Edge color

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorEdgeColorUsage
properties.summary: Edge color usage

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Edge thickness (pixels).

properties.name: SubDSmoothInteriorThicknessScale
properties.summary: Edge thickness scale

properties.name: SubDThicknessUsage
properties.summary: Thickness usage, pixel thickness or a scale thickness

properties.name: SurfaceEdgeApplyPattern
properties.summary: Turn pattern application on or off

properties.name: SurfaceEdgeThickness
properties.summary: Thickness for surface edges

properties.name: SurfaceNakedEdgeApplyPattern
properties.summary: Turn pattern application on or off

properties.name: UseAssignedObjectMaterial
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether objects ought to be drawn using their assigned rendering material.

properties.name: UseBackfaceMaterial
properties.summary: Use the backface material for displaying backfaces.

properties.name: UseCustomBackface
properties.summary: Use a custom material for displaying backfaces.

properties.name: UseCustomObjectColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether objects ought to be drawn using a custom color.

properties.name: UseCustomObjectColorBackfaces
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether objects ought to be drawn using a custom color for back faces.

properties.name: UseCustomObjectMaterial
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether objects ought to be drawn using a custom material.

properties.name: UseCustomObjectMaterialBackfaces
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether objects ought to be drawn using a custom material on backfaces.

properties.name: UseLightColor
properties.summary: Draw lights using light color

properties.name: UseObjectBackfaceMaterial
properties.summary: Use the backface material of the object for displaying its backfaces.

properties.name: UseSectionStyles
properties.summary: When enabled, the appearances of clipping fills and edges are based on objects' section style properties.

properties.name: UseSingleCurveColor
properties.summary: Use a single color for drawing curves
